summary:
Dupilumab is effective for treating moderate-to-severe, uncontrolled asthma, especially in patients with eosinophilia who are reliant on oral steroids. It reduces exacerbation rates and improves lung function when added to standard inhaler therapies. 

Note that you must not include any commentary about the quality of the response beyond what’s required by the task; do NOT say things like "this summarizes well" or "the summary is accurate".
